title: Round Moon for Magic Moon
description: This Ressourcepack gives the "Magic Moon Mod by ChongYuCN" round Moonphases. Works best with the "Round Moon HD by BlasterM5" for the standard Moonphases and of course the "Magic Moon by ChongYuCN".
body: This Ressourcepack gives the "[Magic Moon by ChongYuCN](https://modrinth.com/mod/magic-moon)" round Moonphases. Works best with the "[Round Moon HD by BlasterM5](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/round-moon-hd)" for the standard Moonphases and of course the "Magic Moon by ChongYuCN".
